一夫食堂 6月7日 17:50 来自 HUAWEI P30 那个小的为了跟小朋友玩居然放弃了烤肉。 - 一夫食堂 - 微博
一夫食堂 6月10日 21:11 来自 微博视频号 茨城县日立海岸。 L一夫食堂的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6VuUVmT - 一夫食堂 - 微博

一夫食堂 6月13日 17:45 来自 HUAWEI P30 黄瓜切条用一些盐腌上一晚（不要太多），第二天早上把黄瓜挤一下水分放到盆里备用，取炒锅里面放油加热，然后下入花椒八角，葱姜蒜炸香，倒进去一些酱油，趁热把这个油汁倒进黄瓜里，蒙上保鲜膜放一会就可以吃了。//@MrsLiu_house:请问可以要一下那个酱黄瓜的方子吗 @一夫食堂 来爷爷家吃饭。 136  73 ñ491 6月13日 16:23 来自 HUAWEI P30 - 一夫食堂 - 微博
一夫食堂 6月13日 19:51 来自 HUAWEI P30 稍微加热下会更香*5倍。//@云儿悄悄:确实 不太甜 还好吃 就是牛逼 @一夫食堂 不是自卖自夸，这鲜花饼真是皮酥馅香，淡淡的玫瑰味，亚洲人对点心最高的评价：不太甜，今天开始到端午，全品九折，玫瑰花我真是需要天天喝。 4  39 ñ57 6月12日 18:30 来自 HUAWEI P30 - 一夫食堂 - 微博

10 Tips to Get the Most Out of Apple CarPlay - Gizmodo

Are We Ever Going to Run Out of Digital Storage Space? We live in a world of refuse—not simply the orange peels, Amazon boxes, and old TVs rotting away in landfills but also the texts, emails, and torrented movies looked at once and left to languish in the cloud. We appear to be verging on a crisis… - Gizmodo
Will We Ever Be Able to 'Talk' With Our Pets? - Gizmodo

Could We Live Under the Sea? You could argue that every second spent discussing humans colonizing the solar system is a second not spent salvaging what we have here on Earth and is thereby a concession to nihilism, laziness, and the worst, most craven elements of our public… - Gizmodo

Google’s New Pixel Buds Are a Perfect Example of What It Does Best There was a time not too long ago when it felt like a lot of Google’s devices lacked an identity. But since the release of the Pixel 3a, Google has really carved out a niche when it comes to making simple but still affordable gadgets like the Pixel Buds. - Gizmodo
